query: DELETE FROM desbloqueio_corretor WHERE corretor_id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM bloqueios_agenda WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM links_agendamento WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM conquistas WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM alertas_produtividade WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste');
